releases.notes:
- Update feed moved to GitHub Releases + raw manifest (no more Pages deploy dependency)
- Update-available toast + blue install dialog
- Native snapshot/recording toasts with preview
- Stream Deck plugin support, global shortcuts, snapshot mode

- Update-available toast + blue install dialog
- Native snapshot/recording toasts with preview
- Stream Deck plugin support, global shortcuts, snapshot mode, and more

- Snapshot mode with clipboard + preview toasts
- Logical-area snap for custom selection
- Display picker with live cursor
- Stream Deck plugin support (displays/windows, repeat, open-last)
- Global shortcuts (F1 picker, F6 snapshot, F7 record) — configurable
- General settings tab, default snap mode, GPU-composited overlay
